meaning: n.木板路,木板铺成的散步道
examples: Hundreds of people jammed the boardwalk to watch.
There are many places at the beach to play mini golf, go gocart riding, and to walkalong the boardwalk.
We walk on the boardwalk 3 miles each day.
The open-to-the-public swim starts at 1 pm on 1 January from the boardwalk at Stillwell Avenue in Brooklyn.
Amada, Village Whiskey and Distrito will all be housed in the Revel Beach Casino on the Boardwalk.
